title: Instrument background callback opportunities in spike logs
description: Add explicit opportunity counters for background, suspended, and relaunch callback windows so Phase 0 reliability percentages can be computed from NDJSON exports instead of callback-only counts.
close_reason: Implemented automatic callback opportunity counters (background/suspended/relaunch) in spike logs with analyzer/CLI support and tests

title: Investigate extreme stale-delay outliers in staged provisional samples
description: New phase0-signals-1.ndjson staged subset shows provisional p95 detection 116362.4s despite p50 0.1s. Investigate whether event_occurred_at on significant-location callbacks can be stale from prior movement and define filtering or policy guards for hybrid fast-path metrics and runtime decisions.

title: Beacon V2 reliability-first delivery plan
description: Track implementation of beacon-planning-v2.md across phases, gates, and immediate actions. This epic captures sequencing from reliability baseline through beta hardening.

title: Phase 0: Validate iOS signal assumptions
description: Run validation spikes for CLVisit latency, background wake reliability, SSID feasibility, focus signal utility, and battery cost. Publish findings and finalize MVP signal contract.

title: Phase 0 spike app and instrumentation checklist
description: Create/prepare spike app branch and checklist covering CLVisit latency, background wake behavior, SSID availability, focus utility, and battery profiling instrumentation.
close_reason: Completed Phase 0 spike branch and instrumentation checklist draft

title: Add repository-level .gitignore baseline
description: Create a root .gitignore covering beads local/runtime artifacts plus standard Xcode/Swift, IntelliJ IDEA, and Python exclusions while preserving tracked project files.
close_reason: Added root .gitignore for beads local artifacts plus Xcode/Swift, IDEA, and Python exclusions

title: Phase 0 logging schema and validation report template
description: Define the spike app NDJSON logging schema and provide a concrete Phase 0 validation report template that maps directly to Gate A decisions.
close_reason: Added Phase 0 NDJSON logging schema and Gate A report template

title: Phase 0 spike implementation scaffold
description: Start implementation by scaffolding an iOS spike module for signal capture and NDJSON logging aligned with docs/v2/phase0-spike-log.schema.json.
close_reason: Scaffolded BeaconSpikeCore package with NDJSON logging models and passing tests

title: Implement CoreLocation signal capture adapter
description: Wire CLVisit and significant location change callbacks into BeaconSpikeCore NDJSON logging so the spike app can collect real-world data.
close_reason: Added CoreLocation signal capture adapter with passing tests

title: Phase 0: Wire CoreLocation adapter into iOS app target
description: Integrate BeaconSpikeCore's CoreLocationSignalCaptureAdapter into a runnable iOS app target, including authorization flow, lifecycle wiring, and a visible debug surface that confirms captured signals.
close_reason: Added BeaconSpikeApp iOS target wired to CoreLocationSignalCaptureAdapter with debug UI and logging flow

title: Phase 0: Run BeaconSpikeApp on-device smoke validation
description: Launch BeaconSpikeApp on an iOS device with installed platform components, verify location authorization flow, and confirm NDJSON entries are written for CLVisit/significant-change callbacks.
notes:
Added BeaconSpikeCore log-analysis tooling (BeaconSpikeAnalyze) that summarizes per-signal latency percentiles and can enforce CLVisit presence via --require-clvisit. Remaining acceptance work is physical on-device collection of CLVisit arrival/departure evidence plus broader signal runs.
Documented an explicit hybrid detection policy in planning docs: emit fast provisional transitions from motion+significant-change signals, then confirm/backfill with CLVisit. Added matching Phase 0 checklist/report metrics for provisional speed, confirmation rate, and short-stop false positives.
Analyzed /Users/doughty/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Beacon Data/phase0-signals.ndjson with BeaconSpikeAnalyze --require-clvisit. Result: pass (arrival present yes, departure present yes). Samples: total 9 (arrival 2, departure 1, significant change 6). Latency summary seconds: arrival p50 270.2 p95 1199.5; departure p50 88.7; significant-change p50 25931.3.
Implemented staged hybrid instrumentation in BeaconSpikeCore + BeaconSpikeApp. Added optional NDJSON fields transition_stage, transition_id, confirmation_source, linked_provisional_id; significant-location callbacks now emit provisional IDs and CLVisit callbacks emit confirmed entries linked to nearby recent provisional transitions (24h/500m matching window). Extended SpikeLogAnalyzer + BeaconSpikeAnalyze to report hybrid metrics (provisional emitted, confirmation linkage, confirmation rate, provisional detection p50/p95, confirmation p95, short-stop false-positive count/observations). Analyzer remains backward-compatible for legacy logs without stage metadata. Quality gates: swift test (BeaconSpikeCore) PASS; xcodebuild BeaconSpikeApp Debug iOS Simulator PASS. Re-ran analyzer on latest export with --require-clvisit: stage metadata present=no, provisional emitted=6, confirmation linkage unavailable (n/a), provisional p50=25931.3s, p95=27655.3s.
Filed follow-up issue beacon-1j6 for explicit background opportunity counters needed to compute reliability percentages.
Analyzed new capture /Users/doughty/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Beacon Data/phase0-signals-1.ndjson with BeaconSpikeAnalyze --require-clvisit. Result: pass (arrival yes, departure yes). Full-file samples: total 19 (arrival 6, departure 3, significant-change 10). Latency summary seconds: arrival p50 932.6 p95 63985.6; departure p50 165.1 p95 263.4; significant-change p50 25931.3 p95 116362.4. Hybrid summary on full file: stage metadata yes, linkage yes, provisional emitted 10, confirmed 3, confirmation rate 30.0%, provisional p50 detection 25931.3s, p95 detection 116362.4s, p95 confirmation 4156.5s, short-stop false positives 1/3. Staged-only subset (transition_stage != null) gives cleaner fast-path metrics: provisional emitted 4, confirmed 3, confirmation rate 75.0%, provisional p50 detection 0.1s, p95 detection 116362.4s, p95 confirmation 4156.5s, short-stop false positives 1/3.
Filed follow-up issue beacon-642 to investigate extreme stale-delay outliers in staged provisional samples (p95 116362.4s).
Implemented beacon-1j6 background opportunity instrumentation: added callback_opportunity/session_summary records with opportunity_type (background_window, suspended_window, relaunch_window), lifecycle emission in BeaconSpikeApp (background/suspended windows on didEnterBackground and relaunch window on next cold launch after background), analyzer background reliability summary (opportunities + deduplicated callback counts + reliability%), and CLI/report/schema updates. Validation: swift test (BeaconSpikeCore) PASS (12 tests), xcodebuild BeaconSpikeApp Debug iOS Simulator PASS. Analyzer re-run on phase0-signals-1.ndjson now prints background reliability table: opportunities background/suspended/relaunch = 0/0/0 for legacy capture; observed callbacks = 8/0/4; reliability n/a pending fresh capture with counters.
Implemented item-6 instrumentation + UX fixes: BeaconSpikeApp now logs SSID probes (ssid_probe) and Focus snapshots (focus_snapshot/focus_update) on monitoring start, app foreground transitions, and callback events, with manual buttons for ad-hoc probes. Added Clear Log control backed by NDJSONSpikeLogger.clear(). Fixed first-tap Export NDJSON blank-sheet issue by switching to sheet(item:) export flow. Added NSFocusStatusUsageDescription. Added BeaconSpikeCore adapter APIs/tests for SSID and Focus snapshot capture plus logger clear coverage. Validation: swift test (BeaconSpikeCore) PASS (15 tests); xcodebuild BeaconSpikeApp Debug iOS Simulator PASS.

title: Fix BeaconSpikeApp compile regressions
description: Resolve SpikeCaptureViewModel Float/Double mismatch and set BeaconSpikeCore package platforms so concurrency APIs compile when consumed by the iOS app target.
close_reason: Fixed batteryLevel Float-to-Double conversion and declared package iOS/macOS platform minimums; xcodebuild now succeeds

title: Fix Swift 6 actor-isolation warning in location delegate
description: Adjust SpikeCaptureViewModel CLLocationManagerDelegate conformance to use nonisolated callbacks and hop to MainActor to avoid Swift 6 data-race isolation diagnostics.
close_reason: Made CLLocationManagerDelegate callbacks nonisolated and forwarded work to MainActor; build now succeeds without the isolation warning

title: Add NDJSON export action in spike app
description: Add an Export NDJSON control to BeaconSpikeApp so users can share/save the current phase0-signals.ndjson file to Files or other destinations from the device.
close_reason: Added Export NDJSON control using share sheet with file-existence guard

title: Gate C: Core user value without LLM
description: Gate decision after Phase 3 confirming reliable pass updates and action dispatch without LLM dependency.

title: Gate D: LLM safety and quality accepted
description: Gate decision after Phase 4 confirming policy guardrails and useful shadow-mode quality for controlled rollout.

title: Gate E: Beta readiness sign-off
description: Final gate after Phase 6 for beta readiness, SLO stability, and defect closure.

title: Phase 1: Build secure idempotent ingestion backbone
description: Implement device auth with hashed tokens and rotation/revocation, idempotent transition ingestion, foundational schema and jobs table, plus core logging/metrics.

title: Define transition payload schema with idempotency fields
description: Define transition payload contract including client_event_id (UUIDv7), sent_at, and ingestion idempotency semantics for API and client implementation.
close_reason: Completed transition ingestion contract and JSON schema

title: Draft Phase 1 schema migrations
description: Draft migration plan for devices, transitions, jobs, and audit_log tables including unique(device_id, client_event_id) and retention metadata.
close_reason: Completed Phase 1 migration draft document with yoyo order and DDL

title: Define initial SLOs and dashboard placeholders
description: Set initial reliability SLOs and create dashboard placeholder definitions for ingest latency, duplicate rate, queue depth/age, and worker/external failures.
close_reason: Completed initial SLO and dashboard baseline placeholders

title: Phase 2: Ship deterministic timeline engine
description: Implement deterministic event builder, place resolution with confidence and caching, correction APIs, and replay-safe recomputation.

title: Phase 3: Deliver wallet pass + action dispatch
description: Implement pass signing/generation, pass web service endpoints, APNs dispatch worker with retries and dead-letter observability, and deterministic grocery arrival rule.

title: Phase 4: Add reminders sync + LLM shadow mode
description: Add reminders sync and policy-gated LLM shadow mode with schema validation and quality comparison reporting.

title: Phase 5: Add calendar sync + privacy lifecycle controls
description: Implement Google Calendar sync with dedupe keys, plus export and delete-all endpoints for privacy lifecycle support.

title: Phase 6: Hardening + beta readiness
description: Complete runbooks, resilience/load testing, and release checklist to satisfy 14-day SLO and no unresolved P0/P1 defects.

title: Gate A: Signal set validated
description: Gate decision after Phase 0 with explicit go/no-go for SSID and focus signals plus baseline CLVisit/wake behavior.

title: Gate B: Ingestion and security baseline complete
description: Gate decision after Phase 1 validating idempotent ingestion, token security baseline, and latency targets.

title: Instrument SSID/focus snapshots and fix spike log export UX
description: Implement item-6 capture support by logging SSID probe availability and Focus status snapshots into NDJSON, plus add a clear-log control and fix first-tap blank Export NDJSON sheet behavior in BeaconSpikeApp.
close_reason: Added SSID/focus snapshot instrumentation, clear-log support, and fixed export sheet first-tap behavior

title: Enable Access Wi-Fi Information entitlement for SSID probe fidelity
description: NEHotspotNetwork.fetchCurrent requires the com.apple.developer.networking.wifi-info entitlement; without it probes will return unavailable even with location permission. Add capability/signing config for BeaconSpikeApp and validate on a physical device.
